issue.title: [InstCombine] Unprofitable transformation
issue.body:
https://llvm.godbolt.org/z/PP1q1hTYE
```llvm
define i8 @src(i8 noundef %_23) {
  %_17 = lshr i8 %_23, 4
  %_18 = and i8 %_23, 15
  %_16 = add nuw nsw i8 %_17, %_18
  ret i8 %_16
}
define i8 @tgt(i8 noundef %_23) {
  %_17 = lshr i8 %_23, 4
  %1 = mul i8 %_17, -15
  %_16 = add i8 %1, %_23
  ret i8 %_16
}
```
This goes against our usual guideline to avoid introducing mul out of thin air, and also increases the length of the dependence chain.

From: https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/issues/143513
issue.author: nikic

comments.author: nikic
comments.body: Looks like this is due to SimplifyAddWithRemainder.

tests.test_body:
define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_both_mul(i32 noundef %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_both_mul(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[LSHR:%.*]] = lshr i32 [[ARG:%.*]], 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = mul i32 [[ARG]], 3
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP2:%.*]] = mul i32 [[LSHR]], -41
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add i32 [[TMP2]], [[TMP1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[ADD]]
  %lshr = lshr i32 %arg, 4
  %mul1 = mul i32 %lshr, 7
  %and = and i32 %arg, 15
  %mul2 = mul i32 %and, 3
  %add = add i32 %mul1, %mul2
  ret i32 %add
}
tests.source_program:
define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_both_mul(i32 noundef %arg) {
  %lshr = lshr i32 %arg, 4
  %mul1 = mul i32 %lshr, 7
  %and = and i32 %arg, 15
  %mul2 = mul i32 %and, 3
  %add = add i32 %mul1, %mul2
  ret i32 %add
}
tests.current_optimized_program:
define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_both_mul(i32 noundef %arg) {
  %lshr = lshr i32 %arg, 4
  %1 = mul i32 %arg, 3
  %2 = mul i32 %lshr, -41
  %add = add i32 %2, %1
  ret i32 %add
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_both_mul(i32 noundef %arg) {
  %lshr = lshr i32 %arg, 4
  %1 = mul i32 %arg, 3
  %2 = mul i32 %lshr, -41
  %add = add i32 %2, %1
  ret i32 %add
}

tests.test_body:
define i32 @fold_add_sdiv_srem_by_two_no_mul(i32 noundef %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fold_add_sdiv_srem_by_two_no_mul(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV_NEG:%.*]] = sdiv i32 [[ARG:%.*]], -2
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add i32 [[DIV_NEG]], [[ARG]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[ADD]]
  %div = sdiv i32 %arg, 2
  %rem = srem i32 %arg, 2
  %add = add i32 %div, %rem
  ret i32 %add
}

define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_no_mul(i32 noundef %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_no_mul(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[LSHR:%.*]] = lshr i32 [[ARG:%.*]], 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = and i32 [[ARG]], 15
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add nuw nsw i32 [[LSHR]], [[AND]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[ADD]]
  %lshr = lshr i32 %arg, 4
  %and = and i32 %arg, 15
  %add = add i32 %lshr, %and
  ret i32 %add
}

define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_no_mul(i32 noundef %val) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fold_add_udiv_urem_no_mul(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV:%.*]] = udiv i32 [[VAL:%.*]], 10
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = mul i32 [[DIV]], -9
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add i32 [[TMP1]], [[VAL]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[ADD]]
  %div = udiv i32 %val, 10
  %rem = urem i32 %val, 10
  %add = add i32 %div, %rem
  ret i32 %add
}

define i32 @fold_add_sdiv_srem_no_mul(i32 noundef %val) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fold_add_sdiv_srem_no_mul(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV:%.*]] = sdiv i32 [[VAL:%.*]], 10
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = mul i32 [[DIV]], -9
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add i32 [[TMP1]], [[VAL]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[ADD]]
  %div = sdiv i32 %val, 10
  %rem = srem i32 %val, 10
  %add = add i32 %div, %rem
  ret i32 %add
}

define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_by_two_no_mul(i32 noundef %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fold_add_udiv_urem_by_two_no_mul(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[LSHR:%.*]] = lshr i32 [[ARG:%.*]], 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = sub i32 [[ARG]], [[LSHR]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[ADD]]
  %lshr = lshr i32 %arg, 1
  %and = and i32 %arg, 1
  %add = add i32 %lshr, %and
  ret i32 %add
}

define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_rem_mul(i32 noundef %val) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fold_add_udiv_urem_rem_mul(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV:%.*]] = udiv i32 [[VAL:%.*]], 10
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = mul i32 [[VAL]], 3
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP2:%.*]] = mul i32 [[DIV]], -29
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add i32 [[TMP2]], [[TMP1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[ADD]]
  %div = udiv i32 %val, 10
  %rem = urem i32 %val, 10
  %mul = mul i32 %rem, 3
  %add = add i32 %div, %mul
  ret i32 %add
}
tests.source_program:
define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_rem_mul(i32 noundef %val) {
  %div = udiv i32 %val, 10
  %rem = urem i32 %val, 10
  %mul = mul i32 %rem, 3
  %add = add i32 %div, %mul
  ret i32 %add
}
tests.current_optimized_program:
define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_rem_mul(i32 noundef %val) {
  %div = udiv i32 %val, 10
  %1 = mul i32 %val, 3
  %2 = mul i32 %div, -29
  %add = add i32 %2, %1
  ret i32 %add
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_rem_mul(i32 noundef %val) {
  %div = udiv i32 %val, 10
  %1 = mul i32 %val, 3
  %2 = mul i32 %div, -29
  %add = add i32 %2, %1
  ret i32 %add
}

tests.test_body:
define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_div_mul(i32 noundef %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_div_mul(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[LSHR:%.*]] = lshr i32 [[ARG:%.*]], 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = mul i32 [[LSHR]], -13
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add i32 [[TMP1]], [[ARG]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[ADD]]
  %lshr = lshr i32 %arg, 4
  %mul = mul i32 %lshr, 3
  %and = and i32 %arg, 15
  %add = add i32 %mul, %and
  ret i32 %add
}
tests.source_program:
define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_div_mul(i32 noundef %arg) {
  %lshr = lshr i32 %arg, 4
  %mul = mul i32 %lshr, 3
  %and = and i32 %arg, 15
  %add = add i32 %mul, %and
  ret i32 %add
}

tests.test_body:
define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_rem_mul(i32 noundef %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_rem_mul(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[LSHR:%.*]] = lshr i32 [[ARG:%.*]], 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = and i32 [[ARG]], 15
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[MUL:%.*]] = mul nuw nsw i32 [[AND]], 3
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add nuw nsw i32 [[LSHR]], [[MUL]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[ADD]]
  %lshr = lshr i32 %arg, 4
  %and = and i32 %arg, 15
  %mul = mul i32 %and, 3
  %add = add i32 %lshr, %mul
  ret i32 %add
}
tests.source_program:
define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_rem_mul(i32 noundef %arg) {
  %lshr = lshr i32 %arg, 4
  %and = and i32 %arg, 15
  %mul = mul i32 %and, 3
  %add = add i32 %lshr, %mul
  ret i32 %add
}
tests.current_optimized_program:
define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_rem_mul(i32 noundef %arg) {
  %lshr = lshr i32 %arg, 4
  %1 = mul i32 %arg, 3
  %2 = mul i32 %lshr, -47
  %add = add i32 %2, %1
  ret i32 %add
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define i32 @fold_add_udiv_urem_pow2_rem_mul(i32 noundef %arg) {
  %lshr = lshr i32 %arg, 4
  %and = and i32 %arg, 15
  %mul = mul nuw nsw i32 %and, 3
  %add = add nuw nsw i32 %lshr, %mul
  ret i32 %add
}
